title: LifeLocke
description: A mod for a server that adds Pokémon types and their abilities as status effects
body:
### [Join the Discord! :3](https://discord.com/invite/67MYTGT3)

# LifeLocke!

LifeLocke is a mod which adds **19 different status effects** based on each of the types from Pokemon! (yes, including ???).

Each status effect has a **unique ability** based on the type it is, from shooting fireballs as a fire type, invisibility as a ghost type, freezing water as an ice type and much more!

## Commands

There are currently 4 commands that are added in this mod. Using **/rolltype** will randomly choose one of the types to assign to you. These types now cannot be rolled again by the same player using /rolltype. The list of types a player can or cannot roll again using /rolltype can be modified using **/lifelocke\_debug**. **/psychic** and **/heal** will be explained in the Types section.

## Types

As aforementioned, each type has an ability unique to it. These are either **passive abilites** which are always active, or abilities that must be **activated/toggled** using the **ability key**. By default, it is binded to **R**, but this can be rebound.

**🐛Bug🐛**

*   **Passive:** You are 0.6x size, Jump Boost II, no fall damage, has 8 hearts

**🌑Dark🌑**

*   **Passive:** Health Boost I, Night Vision and Resistance I at night
*   **Toggleable:** Inflict whatever you hit with Blindness I for 10 seconds, costs 1 hunger point

**🐲Dragon🐲**

*   **Passive:** You are 1.3x size, Strength II, has 12 hearts
*   **Active:** Resistance II, Speed II, Health Boost I and Absorption I for 20 seconds, Instant Health I, requires having full hunger to use, costs all hunger and saturation to use

**⚡Electric⚡**

*   **Passive:** Immune to lightning damage, sneak for one second to get Speed III for 5 seconds
*   **Toggleable:** Strike lightning onto anything you hit, costs 2 hunger points

**🧚Fairy🧚**

*   **Active:** Glowing I for a minute, Resistance I, Speed I and Strength I for 20 seconds, 1 minute cooldown, costs 3 hunger points. Able to use the /heal command, which heals half a heart for every heart you sacrifice

**🥊Fighting🥊**

*   **Passive:** Attack cooldown halved, Strength I, unable to use Crafting Tables or Crafters unless turned off with the gamerule fighting\_crafting\_nerf

**🔥Fire🔥**

*   **Passive:** Fire Resistance
*   **Active:** Shoot a ghast fireball, costs 2 hunger points

**🪽Flying🪽**

*   **Passive:** Equipped with an Unbreakable, Binding + Vanishing Elytra. You have Jump Boost V while sneaking
*   **Active:** Summon a Wind Charge, costs 1 hunger point

**👻Ghost👻**

*   **Passive:** Invisibility
*   **Toggleable:** Slow Falling I

**🍃Grass🍃**

*   **Passive:** Punching an entity gives 0.5 hearts
*   **Active:** Bone meal the block you're standing on, costs 1 hunger point. 10% chance to spawn a farm animal and costs 3 hunger points instead

**⛰️Ground⛰️**

*   **Active:** Replace the block below you with dirt, costs 1 hunger point
*   **Active + Sneak:** Replace the 3x3 below you with Stone (90% per block), Stone variants (10% per block) or ores (1% per block), variable hunger cost

**❄️Ice❄️**

*   **Toggleable:** Frost Walker on water and lava, inflict whatever you hit with Slowness I and Weakness I for 5 seconds, costs 1 hunger point

**⬛Normal⬛**

*   **No passive** or **toggleable ability** as of 1.3.1

**☠️Poison☠️**

*   **Passive:** Immune to negative status effects
*   **Toggleable:** Inflict whatever you hit with Poison I for 5 seconds, costs 1 hunger point

**🔮Psychic🔮**

*   **Passive:** Able to use the /psychic command which gives you anybody's coordinates
*   **Toggleable:** Inflict whatever you hit with Levitation I for 2 seconds, costs 1 hunger point

**🪨Rock🪨**

*   **Passive:** Haste V
*   **Active:** Stuck I for 5 seconds, slows you down and locks your y level, costs 2 hunger points

**🔩Steel🔩**

*   **Passive:** Equipped with Unbreakable, Protection V, Binding + Vanishing iron armor except for a helmet

**💧Water💧**

*   **Passive:** Dolphin's Grace, Conduit Power and Luck
*   **Active:** Place water at your feet, costs 1 hunger point

**❓???❓**

*   **Active:** Teleport to a block you are looking at in your reach

Spritework is made by **starsword**, description made by **FlyGamez** :3
